name: Hearty Vegetable Soup (Hess)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a 3 to 4-quart pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring to dissolve bouillon cubes.
3. Cover and simmer gently for 1 hour.
4. Stir occasionally to break up tomatoes into smaller pieces.
Food Exchanges per serving: 2 Vegetable Exchanges
CHO: 12g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 1g; CAL: 54
For low-sodium diets, omit salt. Substitute low-sodium bouillon cubes and unsalted canned tomatoes. Add dried basil for extra flavor.
